title: Premier TreeBrights Mains Operated 5000 LED Lights White, Multi-Action with Timer Function, Indoor/Outdoor Use, for Trees Over 12ft
features: Perfectly suited for trees over 12 feet tall, providing stunning, full coverage.
Automatic Timer: Lights stay on for 8 hours and off for 16, ensuring hassle-free operation.
3 times as many LED's per metre than regular lights on a green cable.
Durable design withstands weather conditions, perfect for outdoor decoration.
125 metre lit length with additional 5 metres cable to plug.
description: Transform your large holiday trees into a breathtaking display with the Premier TreeBrights Mains Operated 5000 LED Lights. Specifically designed for trees over 12 feet, these lights bring a luxurious glow with 5000 high-quality LEDs in a stunning white colour. With multi-action modes including static and a convenient memory function, these lights recall your preferred setting, making decorating simple and effortless. The impressive 2.5 cm bulb spacing provides three times the brightness per meter compared to standard lights, creating a dense and enchanting illumination that stands out. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, the lights feature a timer that stays on for 8 hours and off for 16, making them the ultimate choice for large trees or expansive festive displays.
